title: Weekly Vessel Valuations Report, July 20 2021
summary:
Main
in Weekly Vessel Valuations Report 20/07/2021
Image reference: 2021-07-20_weekly-vessel-valuations-report-july-20-2021_img1.png
Tanker: Mid-age Aframax values have firmed. VLCC Takahashi (314,000 DWT, May 2007, Nantong COSCO KHI) sold to NGM Energy for USD 34.35 mil, VV value USD 34.72 mil. Suezmax Vladimir Velikiy (149,900 DWT, Jan 2002, Hyundai Samho Heavy Ind) sold for USD 16.10 mil, VV value USD 16.01 mil.
